characters.GIRL: Short-haired girl with black bob, glasses, red hoodie, blue pants; often looks anxious.
characters.GUY: Young man with light brown hair and slight stubble, green UNI sweater, blue pants, carries flashlight.
characters.DOG: White dog with brown spots, droopy face, expressive fearful eyes.

lines.dialogue: They say this forest is haunted by a ghostly monster.
lines.notes: Spoken in a storytelling tone as he walks ahead with the flashlight, not visibly scared himself.

lines.dialogue: It has glowing red eyes, large snapping jaws full of dagger-like teeth!
lines.notes: He gestures with one finger, vividly describing the monster; emphasis on the bold details and exclamation point.

lines.dialogue: And its body is like a formless pale cloud!
lines.notes: He continues the description with almost excited energy, painting an eerie picture.

pages.visual_note: GIRL and DOG stare past GUY with wide, fearful eyes and tense body language, clearly seeing something terrifying behind him as he faces away, oblivious. Large white thought-cloud shapes loom above, echoing the described monster.

lines.dialogue: It's right behind me, isn't it.
lines.notes: He looks forward with worried eyes and a tense mouth, finger half-raised, realizing the monster he described is now actually behind him; spoken dryly with dread.
